_comment_purpose: Project-level Copilot hooks for tui-translator. These hooks supplement global hooks and gate risky commands, edits, commits, and task completion.
_comment_execution: Both bash and powershell keys are provided so hooks work on Linux/macOS and Windows. Python stdlib only.
_comment_maintenance: Add disabled: true to an entry to disable it temporarily. Read each hook docstring for full behavior.

preToolUse.comment: GUARD 1 - Dangerous shell commands: blocks privilege escalation, rm -rf on root, force-push, download-pipe-execute, multi-commit hard reset, SQL DROP.
GUARD 2 - Hardcoded secrets: blocks Google API keys, private keys, AWS keys, GitHub tokens, PEM private keys, JWTs. Placeholder values are allowed.
GUARD 3 - Rust/Cargo/CI coding standards: unsafe{} needs SAFETY comment, dbg!() banned, .unwrap() needs justification outside tests, wildcard deps banned.
GUARD 4 - Commit safety gate: blocks dbg!() in staged .rs, credential files (.env, *.pem, *.key), binaries over 1 MB, todo!() with no issue reference.

GUARD 5 - Privacy artifact gate (WBS-08): blocks staged real session JSONL, audio archive WAV, or files inside sessions/, audio-archive/, eval-session/. Test fixtures are allowed under tests/fixtures/ and tests/soak/.
GUARD 6 - Verification evidence gate: runs only on task_complete. Requires a fresh .copilot-state/cargo-test-pass marker when Rust source files changed.
